pageContent:
# Enrollment Policy

Students can enroll online or on-site.

## Enrollment steps
1. Fill out the registration form.
2. Choose the program and schedule.
3. Make the payment.
4. Send proof of payment by email.

## Required documents
- Copy of ID
- Proof of payment

## Contact
For enrollment support, contact advisors@languageacademy.co

## Refund policy
Payments are refundable only within the first 3 calendar days after enrollment, as long as the course has not started.

# FAQ and Certifications

## Certifications
The academy issues a completion certificate for students who complete the program and attend at least 80% of classes.

## Placement test
New students can take a placement test before enrollment.

## Class size
Group classes have a maximum of 12 students.

## Customer support
Human support is available Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM.

## Scope limitation
The academy documents do not include visa guidance, job placement, or accommodation services.

# Prices and Programs

The academy offers English, French, and Portuguese programs.

## English Program
- Basic A1-A2: COP 280,000 per month
- Intermediate B1-B2: COP 320,000 per month
- Advanced C1: COP 360,000 per month

## French Program
- Basic A1-A2: COP 300,000 per month
- Intermediate B1-B2: COP 340,000 per month

## Portuguese Program
- Basic A1-A2: COP 260,000 per month

## Schedules
- Morning classes: Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM
- Evening classes: Monday to Friday, 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM
- Saturday classes: 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM

## Modalities
- On-site classes in Medellín
- Live online classes via Zoom
